task_completion.description: Open Panoply and load the required atmospheric datasets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Panoply application window is open, and both 'air.mon.ltm.nc' and 'slp.mon.ltm.nc' are visible in the datasets/sources panel.

task_completion.description: Generate a plot for Air Temperature for the month of February.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Panoply plot window is visible displaying the 'air' variable (Air Temperature), and the time/date dimension is explicitly set to February (or time index 1).

task_completion.description: Generate a plot for Sea Level Pressure for the month of February.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Panoply plot window is visible displaying the 'slp' variable (Sea Level Pressure), and the time/date dimension is explicitly set to February (or time index 1).

task_completion.description: Save the February Air Temperature plot to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager shows the plot being saved as 'okhotsk_airtemp_feb.png' inside the '/home/ga/Documents/Ryuhyo' directory.

task_completion.description: Save the February Sea Level Pressure plot to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager shows the plot being saved as 'okhotsk_slp_feb.png' inside the '/home/ga/Documents/Ryuhyo' directory.

task_completion.description: Create the quantitative assessment report with the extracted climatological values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing 'thermal_forcing_report.txt' being edited or saved in '/home/ga/Documents/Ryuhyo', containing temperature values between -40 and -5 °C (or 233-268 K) and SLP values between 1025 and 1045 hPa.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Panoply GUI to generate the plots.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Panoply graphical interface (menus, plot windows, array tabs) rather than using terminal commands or Python scripts to bypass the tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent extracted values from the actual datasets.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen reading values from the Panoply plot or array data tabs before writing them into the text report, rather than hallucinating or pasting pre-computed answers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent saved files to the correct target directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths in the save dialogs, text editor, or a terminal 'ls' command should explicitly show '/home/ga/Documents/Ryuhyo' as the location for the outputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires extracting February climatological values. The expected minimum air temperature over the northern Sea of Okhotsk in February is approximately -31 to -34 °C (acceptable range: [-40, -5] °C or [233, 268] K). The expected central pressure of the Siberian High is approximately 1038 hPa (acceptable range: [1025, 1045] hPa). The output files must be saved in /home/ga/Documents/Ryuhyo/ and named exactly: okhotsk_airtemp_feb.png, okhotsk_slp_feb.png, and thermal_forcing_report.txt.
